2024-12-17T13:26:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , the only lane of the section of Nanking Street  between Nathan Road and Chi Wo Street is closed to all traffic. At the same time, vehicles cannot make left turning from Nathan Road (Tsim Sha Tsui bound) to Nanking Street. Motorists are advised to use alternative routes. Traffic is busy now.
2024-12-17T13:26:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，南京街介乎彌敦道與志和街之間的一段唯一行車線現已封閉。 同時，車輛不能由彌敦道(往尖沙咀方向)左轉南京街。 駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-12-17T13:40:00.CONTENT_EN: The only lane of the section of Nanking Street between Nathan Road and Chi Wo Street which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.   At the same time, the traffic arrangement of banning left turning from Nanking Street (Tsim Sha Tsui bound) to Nanking Street which was implemented before is not cancelled.
2024-12-17T13:40:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的南京街介乎彌敦道與志和街之間的一段唯一行車線現已解封。  同時，較早前實施的禁止車輛由彌敦道(往尖沙咀⽅向)左轉南京街的行車措施現已取消。

2024-12-17T13:55:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Ting Kok Road (both bounds) near Tung Tsz Road is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lane is available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.

2024-12-17T14:16:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Ting Kok Road (both bounds) near Tung Tsz Road which was closed due to vehicle breakdown is re-opened to all traffic.
